# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template that creates a service account and generates a JSON key file for application authentication. Include the key creation in the template so applications can authenticate immediately. This is for our application services that need GCP API access from outside GCP.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
- name: sa-service
  type: iam.v1.serviceAccount
  properties:
    accountId: my-service-account
    displayName: My service account
    projectId: $(ref.project-configuration.projectId)

- name: sa-key
  type: iam.v1.serviceAccounts.key
  metadata:
    dependsOn:
    - sa-service
  properties:
    name: $(ref.sa-service.name)
    privateKeyType: TYPE_GOOGLE_CREDENTIALS_FILE
    keyAlgorithm: KEY_ALG_RSA_2048
  
- action: gcp-types/iam-v1:iam.projects.serviceAccounts.getIamPolicy
  properties:
    resource: $(ref.sa-service.name)
  
- name: setIamPolicy
  type: gcp-types/iam-v1:iam.projects.serviceAccounts.setIamPolicy
  metadata:
    dependsOn:
    - sa-service
  properties:
    resource: $(ref.sa-service.name)
    policy: 
      bindings:
      - role: roles/editor
        members:
        - serviceAccount:$(ref.sa-service.email)
